{
  "english": {
    "IsA": [
      "It is a brand-name American adaptation of the Indian cross and circle board game Pachisi."
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "It has two dice.",
      "It has four pieces per player.",
      "It has a gameboard with a track around the outside.",
      "It has four corner spaces.",
      "It has four home paths leading to a central end space.",
      "It has 68 spaces around the edge of the board.",
      "It has 12 darkened safe spaces.",
      "It has a player's nest or starting area in each corner of the board."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by pieces moving from the nest to the colored starting space to the left of the nest.",
      "It is characterized by pieces only leaving the nest with a roll of a five on a single die or the sum of the dice.",
      "It is characterized by the possibility of capturing opponent's pieces along the way.",
      "It is characterized by the rule that all die rolls must be taken and may not be voluntarily forfeited.",
      "It is characterized by the rule that if a player cannot use both dice, the player must use one of the dice, if possible.",
      "It is characterized by the rule that if either die can be used, the player must use the larger die.",
      "It is characterized by the rule that all die moves must be taken before the application of any extra rewards.",
      "It is characterized by a roll of doubles granting four moves.",
      "It is characterized by the bonus of the bottom dice numbers being granted only if all four pieces are out of the nest.",
      "It is characterized by the rule that when a piece ends its move on the same space as an opponent's piece, the opponent's piece is sent back to its nest."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for playing a board game.",
      "It is used for determining player order by rolling a single die.",
      "It is used for moving pieces around the board.",
      "It is used for capturing opponent's pieces.",
      "It is used for forming a blockade with two pieces of a single player occupying the same space.",
      "It is used for breaking a blockade with the roll of a double one.",
      "It is used for winning the game by moving all four pieces to the home position."
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "It is located on a gameboard with a track around the outside.",
      "It is located on a gameboard with four corner spaces.",
      "It is located on a gameboard with four home paths leading to a central end space.",
      "It is located on a gameboard with 68 spaces around the edge.",
      "It is located on a gameboard with darkened safe spaces.",
      "It is located on a gameboard with a player's nest or starting area in each corner."
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "BuiltBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "OriginatedIn": [

    ],

      "It affects the turn of play.",
      "It affects the distribution of moves with doubles.",
      "It affects the granting of bonus moves from bottom dice numbers.",

      "It affects the ability to land on a safe space.",
      "It affects the movement through a blockade.",
      "It affects the breaking of a blockade."

    "ConsistsOf": [
      "It consists of a brand-name American adaptation of the Indian cross and circle board game Pachisi.",
      "It consists of two dice.",
      "It consists of four pieces per player.",
      "It consists of a gameboard with a track around the outside.",
      "It consists of four corner spaces.",
      "It consists of four home paths leading to a central end space.",
      "It consists of 68 spaces around the edge of the board.",
      "It consists of 12 darkened safe spaces.",
      "It consists of a player's nest or starting area in each corner of the board.",

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それはパチーシというインドのクロスアンドサークルボードゲームのブランド名のアメリカ版です。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは2つのサイコロを持っています。",
      "それはプレイヤーごとに4つの駒を持っています。",
      "それは外周にトラックがあるゲームボードを持っています。",
      "それは4つのコーナーマスを持っています。",
      "それは中央のゴールスペースにつながる4つのホームパスを持っています。",
      "それはボードの端に沿って68マスあります。",
      "それは12の暗くなったセーフスペースを持っています。",
      "それはボードの各コーナーにプレイヤーの巣、またはスタートエリアがあります。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは駒が巣から巣の左にある色のついたスタートスペースに移動するという特徴があります。",
      "それは駒がサイコロ1つで5の目またはサイコロの合計でしか巣から出られないという特徴があります。",
      "それは途中で相手の駒を取ることができるという特徴があります。",
      "それはすべてのサイコロの目は必ず使用しなければならず、任意で放棄することはできないという特徴があります。",
      "それはプレイヤーが両方のサイコロを使用できない場合、可能な限り1つのサイコロを使用しなければならないという特徴があります。",
      "それはどちらかのサイコロを使用できる場合、大きい方のサイコロを使用しなければならないという特徴があります。",
      "それはすべてのサイコロの目は、追加の報酬が適用される前に使用しなければならないという特徴があります。",
      "それはダブルの目が出ると4回の移動ができるという特徴があります。",
      "それは4つの駒すべてが巣から出ている場合にのみ、サイコロの底面の目のボーナスが与えられるという特徴があります。",
      "それは駒が相手の駒と同じマスに止まると、相手の駒は巣に戻されるという特徴があります。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはボードゲームをプレイするために使用されます。",
      "それはサイコロ1つを振ってプレイヤー順を決定するために使用されます。",
      "それは駒をボード上で移動させるために使用されます。",
      "それは相手の駒を取るために使用されます。",
      "それは2つの駒が同じマスを占めることでブロックを形成するために使用されます。",
      "それはダブルの1の目でブロックを壊すために使用されます。",
      "それはすべての駒をホームポジションに移動させてゲームに勝つために使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それは外周にトラックがあるゲームボード上にあります。",
      "それは4つのコーナーマスがあるゲームボード上にあります。",
      "それは中央のゴールスペースにつながる4つのホームパスがあるゲームボード上にあります。",
      "それはボードの端に沿って68マスあるゲームボード上にあります。",
      "それは暗くなったセーフスペースがあるゲームボード上にあります。",
      "それは各コーナーにプレイヤーの巣またはスタートエリアがあるゲームボード上にあります。"
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],

    ],

    ],

      "それは学ぶのが最も簡単なボードゲームの1つとして知られています。",

IsA: It is a brand-name American adaptation of the Indian cross and circle board game Pachisi.
HasA: It has four pieces per player.
It has a gameboard with a track around the outside.
It has four home paths leading to a central end space.
It has 68 spaces around the edge of the board.
It has a player's nest or starting area in each corner of the board.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by pieces moving from the nest to the colored starting space to the left of the nest.
It is characterized by pieces only leaving the nest with a roll of a five on a single die or the sum of the dice.
It is characterized by the possibility of capturing opponent's pieces along the way.
It is characterized by the rule that all die rolls must be taken and may not be voluntarily forfeited.
It is characterized by the rule that if a player cannot use both dice, the player must use one of the dice, if possible.
It is characterized by the rule that if either die can be used, the player must use the larger die.
It is characterized by the rule that all die moves must be taken before the application of any extra rewards.
It is characterized by a roll of doubles granting four moves.
It is characterized by the bonus of the bottom dice numbers being granted only if all four pieces are out of the nest.
It is characterized by the rule that when a piece ends its move on the same space as an opponent's piece, the opponent's piece is sent back to its nest.
UsedFor: It is used for playing a board game.
It is used for determining player order by rolling a single die.
It is used for moving pieces around the board.
It is used for capturing opponent's pieces.
It is used for forming a blockade with two pieces of a single player occupying the same space.
It is used for breaking a blockade with the roll of a double one.
It is used for winning the game by moving all four pieces to the home position.
LocatedIn: It is located on a gameboard with a track around the outside.
It is located on a gameboard with four corner spaces.
It is located on a gameboard with four home paths leading to a central end space.
It is located on a gameboard with 68 spaces around the edge.
It is located on a gameboard with darkened safe spaces.
It is located on a gameboard with a player's nest or starting area in each corner.
PublishedIn: It was published by E. G. Selchow & Co.
It was published by Winning Moves Games USA.
Affects: It affects the movement of pieces around the board.
It affects the ability to leave the nest.
It affects the possibility of capturing opponent's pieces.
It affects the turn of play.
It affects the distribution of moves with doubles.
It affects the granting of bonus moves from bottom dice numbers.
It affects the opponent's piece when captured.
It affects the ability to land on a safe space.
It affects the movement through a blockade.
It affects the breaking of a blockade.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a brand-name American adaptation of the Indian cross and circle board game Pachisi.
It consists of two dice.
It consists of four pieces per player.
It consists of a gameboard with a track around the outside.
It consists of four corner spaces.
It consists of four home paths leading to a central end space.
It consists of 68 spaces around the edge of the board.
It consists of 12 darkened safe spaces.
It consists of a player's nest or starting area in each corner of the board.
It consists of rules for gameplay, rewards, and winning.
PartOf: It is part of the category of cross and circle board games.
KnownFor: It is known for being a classic chase game from India.
It is known for having withstood the test of millennia.
It is known for being one of the easiest board games to learn.
It is known for being perfectly suited for family play.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with E. G. Selchow & Co.
It is associated with Winning Moves Games USA.
It is associated with the Indian cross and circle board game Pachisi.
It is associated with family play.
It is associated with classic chase games.
About: It is about playing a board game.
It is about moving pieces around a board.
It is about capturing opponent's pieces.
It is about forming and breaking blockades.
It is about reaching the home position to win.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Indian cross and circle board game Pachisi.

それは中央のゴールスペースにつながる4つのホームパスを持っています。
それはボードの端に沿って68マスあります。
それは12の暗くなったセーフスペースを持っています。
